TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Masinghalan ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Namasya Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 147 buwan, 592 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 569 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 23 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Cou 5%, Paywan 1%, Kanakanabu 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Masinghalan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Masinghalan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masinghalan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Masinghalan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masinghalan hya' ga Takanua. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mas~ɕiŋħalan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu namas~ɕja ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, kanakanaβu *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa takanua. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Masinghalan ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Namasya Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 147 buwan, 592 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 569 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 23 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Cou 5%, Paywan 1%, Kanakanabu 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Masinghalan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Masinghalan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masinghalan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Masinghalan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Masinghalan hya' ga Takanua. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mas~ɕiŋħalan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu namas~ɕja ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, kanakanaβu *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mas~ɕiŋħalan ħjaʔ ɣa takanua. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
